examples: A new method to fabricate aspherical compound lens was proposed.
A new method of surface shape measurement of aspherical optical components.
This is a very simple and practical new method for the measuring of aspherical surfaces.
Here, the 808 PureView delivers again with an autofocus prime lens made by Carl Zeiss that features five aspherical glass elements (in one group) and a mechanical shutter.
The use of Special Low Dispersion (SLD) glass accompanied by aspherical lens elements not only compensates for a variety of aberrations, but also allows for a more compact size.
